items.caption: A radio presenter in a live broadcast studio, wearing headphones and adjusting a soundboard with illuminated buttons, suggesting control over audio levels and effects.

In a radio studio, a woman in a yellow top and beige skirt stands near a microphone, smiling and gesturing with her hands. She is speaking with a woman in a gray cardigan, who is seated at a control panel with multiple screens and microphones. The woman in the gray cardigan is gesturing with her hands, possibly explaining or discussing something. The studio has a professional look with a large window showing a glimpse of a gym in the background.
